channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: Staff Sergeant Nave Habshoosh killed in southern Lebanon - The Jerusalem Post

Between June 15 and June 20, 2026, as many as 19 Indian startups from diverse sectors raised over $469 million in funding from investors. These sectors include AI, Deeptech, Foodtech, Cleantech, Insurtech, FMCG, Wealthtech, Healthtech, B2B, Creatortech, - instagram.com
